settings.cus_product_description: 3-in-1 Vacuum Mop Wash | Auto Clean and Dry System | 20000 Pa Powerful Suction | Dual-Layer Comb Design

settings.heading: Key Features
settings.content:
• Auto Clean & Dry System - Effortless cleaning, no dirty mops.
  • 20000Pa Powerful Suction - Vacuum, mop & wash in one.
  • Zero Hair Tangling - Built-in comb teeth technology.
  • Edge-to-Edge Cleaning - No corner left behind.
  • Large Tank, Long Runtime - Clean more with fewer refills.
  • 99.9% Bacteria Removal- Deep clean with electrolyzed water.
  • Smart Interaction System - Easy modes & voice guidance.

settings.heading: What is a Wet Dry Vacuum?
settings.content:
A wet-dry vacuum is an all-in-one smart floor cleaner that combines vacuuming, mopping, washing, active scraping, and self-cleaning.

Key Highlights:

  • Wet & Dry Versatility: Unlike traditional vacuums that can only handle dry debris, its biggest highlight is the ability to tackle mixed wet and dry messes simultaneously—such as spilled soy sauce, instant noodles, or broken eggs.
  • No Manual Mop Washing: Built with an internal water circulation system, it eliminates the need for manual mop washing. With just one touch, the self-cleaning technology completely frees your hands.

settings.heading: You may also like
What types of dirt can the Honiture M7 wet dry vacuum handle?
settings.content: The M7 is specifically designed for "wet and dry" use. It simultaneously vacuums up dust and hair (dry debris) while mopping away spills such as milk, coffee, and sauces (wet messes). For heavy grease stains in the kitchen or dried-on mud marks, its high-speed roller brush delivers deep-scrubbing performance.

settings.heading: Does the Honiture M7 wet-dry vacuum feature specific optimizations for pet hair?
settings.content: The M7 features an optimized suction inlet structure and roller brush comb teeth, effectively preventing long hair and pet fur from tangling around the roller brush.

settings.heading: Which floor types can the Honiture M7 Wet & Dry clean?
settings.content:
As an all-in-one wet dry vacuum, the Honiture M7 is engineered to tackle messes on a variety of indoor sealed hard surfaces.

  • Hardwood & Plank: Keeps your wood floors streak-free.
  • Ceramic & Porcelain Tile: Easily removes stubborn stains and grime.
  • Laminate & Vinyl (LVP): Safe for moisture-sensitive flooring when used as directed.
  • Marble & Stone: Provides a gentle yet powerful clean for premium surfaces.

settings.heading: How long can the Honiture M7 wet dry vacuum run on a single charge?
settings.content: The M7 is equipped with a high-capacity lithium-ion battery, offering a single-charge runtime of up to 50 minutes—sufficient to clean a residence of approximately 200 square meters in a single session.

settings.heading: What is the capacity of the Honiture M7's clean water tank and dirty water tank?
settings.content: M7 floor washer offers a 720 ml dirty water tank and an 800 ml clean water tank. The large-capacity dual-tank design ensures that frequent refilling or emptying is not required during the cleaning process.

settings.heading: Does Honiture M7 come with a warranty?
settings.content: Honiture provides a 2-year warranty and lifetime technical support for the M7 wet & dry vacuum. If you have any questions, feel free to contact our customer service team at any time.

settings.heading: Does the Honiture M7 wet dry vac filtration system need to be replaced?
settings.content: The M7 wet&dry vacuum utilizes a high-efficiency HEPA filter capable of capturing 99.9% of fine dust. We recommend replacing the filter every 3 to 6 months to maintain optimal performance.
